name: cgh
summary: Local code graph for AI coding agents. Indexes your repo into an embedded graph DB (DuckDB by default, Kuzu opt-in) plus SQLite FTS, exposes 30+ MCP tools to Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini. Federates across sibling repos.
